Off Calendar Mar-14-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING IS ADOPTED. Plaintiff Yoga Journal's application for right to attach order and writ of attachment is granted. No opposition has been filed. The undertaking is set in the amount of $10,000. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.
